# Kimi CLI Platform — gald3r Configuration Guide

**Platform**: Kimi CLI (Moonshot AI)
**Config Folder**: `.kimi/`
**gald3r Version**: 1.0.0
**Official Docs**: https://www.kimi.com/code/docs/en (mirror: https://moonshotai.github.io/kimi-cli/en/)
**Instruction File**: root `AGENTS.md` (generated by `/init`; injected via `KIMI_AGENTS_MD`). Kimi does NOT read `CLAUDE.md`.
**Authoritative skill**: `g-skl-platform-kimi` (if present)
**Capability detail**: see `../PLATFORM_SPEC.md`

---

## Folder Layout

```
<project-root>/
├── AGENTS.md                       # instruction file (injected via KIMI_AGENTS_MD)
├── .kimi/
│   └── skills/   <name>/SKILL.md   # Agent Skills (YAML frontmatter + Markdown body)
├── .claude/skills/ <name>/SKILL.md # ALSO discovered by Kimi (cross-tool compatible)
├── .codex/skills/  <name>/SKILL.md # ALSO discovered by Kimi (cross-tool compatible)
└── .agents/skills/ <name>/SKILL.md # ALSO discovered by Kimi (cross-tool compatible)

~/.kimi/
├── config.toml                     # hooks ([[hooks]]) + settings (TOML, user-level)
├── skills/   <name>/SKILL.md       # user-level skills
└── agents/   <name>.yaml           # built-in / custom agent specs
```

---

## Cross-Tool Reuse (important)

Kimi discovers Agent Skills from **`.claude/skills/` and `.codex/skills/`** in addition to
`.kimi/skills/`, so gald3r's `SKILL.md` artifacts are drop-in reusable. The `.kimi/skills/`
copy shipped here is the explicit native form.

## gald3r Naming Conventions

| Component | Surface |
|-----------|---------|
| Skills | `.kimi/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` (also `.claude/skills/`, `.codex/skills/`, `.agents/skills/`) |
| Agents | `~/.kimi/agents/<name>.yaml` (user-level YAML specs) |
| Commands | expressed through Skills / Plugins (no dedicated standalone slash-command file) |
| Hooks | `~/.kimi/config.toml` (`[[hooks]]`) |
| MCP | `kimi mcp` / `/mcp-config` (this scaffold ships `.kimi/.mcp.json` as reference) |

## Capability Note

Kimi natively supports Agent Skills, rules/memory, subagents, lifecycle hooks, MCP, and
user-defined commands (via Skills + Plugins). The instruction file gald3r owns is `AGENTS.md`
(not `CLAUDE.md`). The `~/.kimi/config.toml` schema is marked experimental and may change.
